TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: === O 'ayaway a micalapay mikowan to taywan === Talacowa i 'ayaw no tolo ano eca i sepat a patek (3000-4000) a miheca a tayni i Taywan ko tatapangan no 'Amis a malikakaay nikawrira, masamaanay itiya hakiya? Caay ka fana' kita, o kafana'an ita i, mahaenay. Malecad ko Tayal, Tuku, Pinuyumayan, Tangafolan, Bunun ato 'Amis a militafad itiya ho, "O sakanga'ay no kakaenen ko pisalisin to tafad" saan, saka, militafad ko nia misa'Pangcahay (Yincumin) a ma'emin. I 'ayaw no pisalisin to kakaenen to mihecahecaan a militafad, samatiya han naira o pi'adop to 'a'adopen ko pilitafad. O mangta'ay a tafad i, o macodahay a fafahiyan ko mamitokad to nia mangta'ay a tafad a milifanges. Caay patedo a mipateli to nia tafad, mi'edaw ho a mitingil to no kawas a ca'of to malo pipatelian, ta itira a misanga' to patelian, ta itira a mapaso'opo a ma'emin ko tafad. Saka, matalaw a talaraay a ciomah ko tamdaw to na ira ko militafaday, yo ira to ko Holamta ato Holam tangasa i nika iraan no Dipong i, ira ho ko militafaday a demak. O kafana'an to pakayniay i kafafalic no mikowanay to Taywan ato demak nangra i Pangcah i, mahaenay. Saka cecay i, i 1590 a miheca a tayni i Taywan ko Poetakal a finacadan no Europe a maro', mipahaciway ko demak nangra a micomod itini. Itiya ho i, o kilakilang ho a ma'emin ko Taywan, caay ho ka pamatang ko Taywan itiya. Saka tosa i, o Holanto (Netherlan) ko tayniay itini i saka pito a folad no 1602 mihecaan, tona caay ka 'edeng ko sofitay nangra, saka ira to ko no Holam a sofitay a milaplap i cangraan. Mata'elif k tosa polo' miheca (1622) i, keriden ni Karl ko sofitay no Holanto a micomod i Pengfu, ta songila'en nangra ko pisitalaan. I 1624 mihecaan micomod cangra to Taywan a maro' i Taynan a mikowan to polong no Taywan. I 1630 mhecaan patireng cangra i An-ping to pisitalaan no sofiyay a loma', ta itiya i 1650 mihecaan a mapatireng nangra ko roma a pisatalaan to iraay ho a pikacawan. Mapasifana' no Holanto ko maro'ay itini i Taywan a masaPangcahay (Yincomin). O tata'angay a demak nangra i, toloay, sakacecay i, o papaising to 'alomanay, mipatenak cangra pakayniay i pitoor to Kawas no misaKristoay, o romasato, pasifana' cangra to tilid. Na mikowan ko Holanta i 1626 miheca i, tayni sato ko Sipaniya a maro' itini i ka'amisay a niyaro' no Taywan tangasa i 1642 miheca itini i Taywan. I 'ayaw no piliyas no Holanta to Taywan i, safaw 'enem a miheca ko pidipot no Sipaniya. Nikawrira, caay ka tangasa itini i tadaPangcah ko tayal nangra. Mapalowad to no Sipaniya ko sapicomod no itiniay i Taywan to pitooran nangra o Tingsokiw. I Tangafolan cangra a patenak, safaw falo miheca ko Sipaniya a maro' itini i ka'amisay a niyaro' itiya ho. O romasato, itiya iraay to ko Dipong ato Holo tamdaw (o aniniay a Payrang) itini a macacamocamol a maro'. O Holanta pasayra itiraay i Singko a niyaro' no Taynan a Tangafolan patenak to sowal no Kawas itiya, saka ira ko lima a polo' ko tamdaw a mapaino'ay itiya. Nikawrira, oya i laloma'ay no kiwkay a mitooray facalay ko tayal i pili'en no Dipong a tamdaw patayra i kitakit nangra i Dipong papinanam to no Dipong a pakayraan a kawas, saka, yo minokay ito cangra i, caay to piraod to kiwkaycangra. Yo pikowan ho ko Holanta itini i, madadoedoay to ko Holam (Payrang) micomod i Taywan. Itiya ci Cen cen-kong ko milaplapay to Holanta nai Taywan, nanoya, safeleng sato micomod a tayni ko Holam a tamdaw. O pikowan no Holanta itini i Taywan ira ko 39 ko mihecaan itiya. O saka tolo i, o pikowan no Dipong itini i Taywan, o picingcing no Dipong itiya, nai 1895 mihecaan (Cinkowangsi 21 miheca, Dipong Minci 28 miheca) masasitelak to (Makowan telek) pakelac ko Taywan to Dipong, tangasa i 1945 miheca (Cawhe 20 miheca, Minko 34 miheca) o Conghoaminko ko micadaay, ira ko 50 mihecaan ko picingcingan itiya. O saka sepat i, o Congko a tamdaw (aniniay a Payrang) to ko micingcingay to Taywan, tangasa anini. ==== Mitiliday to no 'Amis, ci Masao Nikar. ====
S.PHON: === o~u °ajawaj a mi ¶a…ĺapaj miko~uwan to~u tajwan === ta…ĺa ¶o~uwa i °ajaw no~u to~u…ĺo~u ano~u …ô ¶a i s…ôpat a pat…ôk (****-****) a mińß…ô ¶a a tajni i tajwan ko~u tatapaŇčan no~u °amis a ma…ĺikakaaj nikawrira, masamaanaj itija ńßakija? ¶aaj ka fana ° kita, o~u kafana °an ita i, mańßa…ônaj. ma…ĺ…ô ¶a…¨~…ģ ko~u taja…ĺ, to~u~uko~u~u, pino~u~ujo~u~umajan, taŇčafo~u…ĺan, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un ato~u °amis a mi…ĺitafa…¨~…ģ itija ńßo~u, "o~u sakaŇča °aj no~u kaka…ôn…ôn ko~u pisa…ĺisin to~u tafa…¨~…ģ" saan, saka, mi…ĺitafa…¨~…ģ ko~u nia misa °paŇč ¶ańßaj (jin ¶o~u~umin) a ma °…ômin. i °ajaw no~u pisa…ĺisin to~u kaka…ôn…ôn to~u mińß…ô ¶ańß…ô ¶aan a mi…ĺitafa…¨~…ģ, samatija ńßan naira o~u pi °a…¨~…ģo~up to~u °a °a…¨~…ģo~up…ôn ko~u pi…ĺitafa…¨~…ģ. o~u maŇčta °aj a tafa…¨~…ģ i, o~u ma ¶o~u…¨~…ģańßaj a fafańßijan ko~u mamito~uka…¨~…ģ to~u nia maŇčta °aj a tafa…¨~…ģ a mi…ĺifaŇč…ôs. ¶aaj pat…ô…¨~…ģo~u a mipat…ô…ĺi to~u nia tafa…¨~…ģ, mi °…ô…¨~…ģaw ńßo~u a mitiŇči…ĺ to~u no~u kawas a ¶a °o~uf to~u ma…ĺo~u pipat…ô…ĺian, ta itira a misaŇča ° to~u pat…ô…ĺian, ta itira a mapaso~u °o~upo~u a ma °…ômin ko~u tafa…¨~…ģ. saka, mata…ĺaw a ta…ĺaraaj a ¶io~umańß ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw to~u na ira ko~u mi…ĺitafa…¨~…ģaj, jo~u ira to~u ko~u ńßo~u…ĺamta ato~u ńßo~u…ĺam taŇčasa i nika iraan no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč i, ira ńßo~u ko~u mi…ĺitafa…¨~…ģaj a …¨~…ģ…ômak. o~u kafana °an to~u pakajniaj i kafafa…ĺi ¶ no~u miko~uwanaj to~u tajwan ato~u …¨~…ģ…ômak naŇčra i paŇč ¶ańß i, mańßa…ônaj. saka ¶…ô ¶aj i, i **** a mińß…ô ¶a a tajni i tajwan ko~u po~u…ôtaka…ĺ a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan no~u …ôo~u~uro~up…ô a maro~u °, mipańßa ¶iwaj ko~u …¨~…ģ…ômak naŇčra a mi ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģ itini. itija ńßo~u i, o~u ki…ĺaki…ĺaŇč ńßo~u a ma °…ômin ko~u tajwan, ¶aaj ńßo~u ka pamataŇč ko~u tajwan itija. saka to~usa i, o~u ńßo~u…ĺanto~u (n…ôtńß…ôr…ĺan) ko~u tajniaj itini i saka pito~u a fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ no~u **** mińß…ô ¶aan, to~una ¶aaj ka °…ô…¨~…ģ…ôŇč ko~u so~ufitaj naŇčra, saka ira to~u ko~u no~u ńßo~u…ĺam a so~ufitaj a mi…ĺap…ĺap i ¶aŇčraan. mata °…ô…ĺif k to~usa po~u…ĺo~u ° mińß…ô ¶a (****) i, k…ôri…¨~…ģ…ôn ni kar…ĺ ko~u so~ufitaj no~u ńßo~u…ĺanto~u a mi ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģ i p…ôŇčfo~u~u, ta so~uŇči…ĺa °…ôn naŇčra ko~u pisita…ĺaan. i **** mińß…ô ¶aan mi ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģ ¶aŇčra to~u tajwan a maro~u ° i tajnan a miko~uwan to~u po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u tajwan. i **** mńß…ô ¶aan patir…ôŇč ¶aŇčra i an-piŇč to~u pisita…ĺaan no~u so~ufijaj a …ĺo~uma °, ta itija i **** mińß…ô ¶aan a mapatir…ôŇč naŇčra ko~u ro~uma a pisata…ĺaan to~u iraaj ńßo~u a pika ¶awan. mapasifana ° no~u ńßo~u…ĺanto~u ko~u maro~u °aj itini i tajwan a masapaŇč ¶ańßaj (jin ¶o~umin). o~u tata °aŇčaj a …¨~…ģ…ômak naŇčra i, to~u…ĺo~uaj, saka ¶…ô ¶aj i, o~u papaisiŇč to~u °a…ĺo~umanaj, mipat…ônak ¶aŇčra pakajniaj i pito~uo~ur to~u kawas no~u misakristo~uaj, o~u ro~umasato~u, pasifana ° ¶aŇčra to~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ. na miko~uwan ko~u ńßo~u…ĺanta i **** mińß…ô ¶a i, tajni sato~u ko~u sipanija a maro~u ° itini i ka °amisaj a nijaro~u ° no~u tajwan taŇčasa i **** mińß…ô ¶a itini i tajwan. i °ajaw no~u pi…ĺijas no~u ńßo~u…ĺanta to~u tajwan i, safaw °…ôn…ôm a mińß…ô ¶a ko~u pi…¨~…ģipo~ut no~u sipanija. nikawrira, ¶aaj ka taŇčasa itini i ta…¨~…ģapaŇč ¶ańß ko~u taja…ĺ naŇčra. mapa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģ to~u no~u sipanija ko~u sapi ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģ no~u itiniaj i tajwan to~u pito~uo~uran naŇčra o~u tiŇčso~ukiw. i taŇčafo~u…ĺan ¶aŇčra a pat…ônak, safaw fa…ĺo~u mińß…ô ¶a ko~u sipanija a maro~u ° itini i ka °amisaj a nijaro~u ° itija ńßo~u. o~u ro~umasato~u, itija iraaj to~u ko~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč ato~u ńßo~u…ĺo~u tam…¨~…ģaw (o~u aniniaj a pajraŇč) itini a ma ¶a ¶amo~u ¶amo~u…ĺ a maro~u °. o~u ńßo~u…ĺanta pasajra itiraaj i siŇčko~u a nijaro~u ° no~u tajnan a taŇčafo~u…ĺan pat…ônak to~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u kawas itija, saka ira ko~u …ĺima a po~u…ĺo~u ° ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw a mapaino~u °aj itija. nikawrira, o~uja i …ĺa…ĺo~uma °aj no~u kiwkaj a mito~uo~uraj fa ¶a…ĺaj ko~u taja…ĺ i pi…ĺi °…ôn no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč a tam…¨~…ģaw patajra i kitakit naŇčra i …¨~…ģipo~uŇč papinanam to~u no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč a pakajraan a kawas, saka, jo~u mino~ukaj ito~u ¶aŇčra i, ¶aaj to~u pirao~u…¨~…ģ to~u kiwkaj ¶aŇčra. jo~u piko~uwan ńßo~u ko~u ńßo~u…ĺanta itini i, ma…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģo~u…ô…¨~…ģo~uaj to~u ko~u ńßo~u…ĺam (pajraŇč) mi ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģ i tajwan. itija ¶i ¶…ôn ¶…ôn-ko~uŇč ko~u mi…ĺap…ĺapaj to~u ńßo~u…ĺanta nai tajwan, nano~uja, saf…ô…ĺ…ôŇč sato~u mi ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģ a tajni ko~u ńßo~u…ĺam a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u piko~uwan no~u ńßo~u…ĺanta itini i tajwan ira ko~u ** ko~u mińß…ô ¶aan itija. o~u saka to~u…ĺo~u i, o~u piko~uwan no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč itini i tajwan, o~u pi ¶iŇč ¶iŇč no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč itija, nai **** mińß…ô ¶aan ( ¶inko~uwaŇčsi ** mińß…ô ¶a, …¨~…ģipo~uŇč min ¶i ** mińß…ô ¶a) masasit…ô…ĺak to~u (mako~uwan t…ô…ĺ…ôk) pak…ô…ĺa ¶ ko~u tajwan to~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč, taŇčasa i **** mińß…ô ¶a ( ¶awńß…ô ** mińß…ô ¶a, minko~u ** mińß…ô ¶a) o~u ¶o~uŇčńßo~uaminko~u ko~u mi ¶a…¨~…ģaaj, ira ko~u ** mińß…ô ¶aan ko~u pi ¶iŇč ¶iŇčan itija. o~u saka s…ôpat i, o~u ¶o~uŇčko~u a tam…¨~…ģaw (aniniaj a pajraŇč) to~u ko~u mi ¶iŇč ¶iŇčaj to~u tajwan, taŇčasa anini. ==== miti…ĺi…¨~…ģaj to~u no~u °amis, ¶i masao~u nikar. ====
S.FORM: === O 'ayaway a micalapay mikowan to taywan === Talacowa i 'ayaw no tolo ano eca i sepat a patek (3000-4000) a miheca a tayni i Taywan ko tatapangan no 'Amis a malikakaay nikawrira, masamaanay itiya hakiya? Caay ka fana' kita, o kafana'an ita i, mahaenay. Malecad ko Tayal, Tuku, Pinuyumayan, Tangafolan, Bunun ato 'Amis a militafad itiya ho, "O sakanga'ay no kakaenen ko pisalisin to tafad" saan, saka, militafad ko nia misa'Pangcahay (Yincumin) a ma'emin. I 'ayaw no pisalisin to kakaenen to mihecahecaan a militafad, samatiya han naira o pi'adop to 'a'adopen ko pilitafad. O mangta'ay a tafad i, o macodahay a fafahiyan ko mamitokad to nia mangta'ay a tafad a milifanges. Caay patedo a mipateli to nia tafad, mi'edaw ho a mitingil to no kawas a ca'of to malo pipatelian, ta itira a misanga' to patelian, ta itira a mapaso'opo a ma'emin ko tafad. Saka, matalaw a talaraay a ciomah ko tamdaw to na ira ko militafaday, yo ira to ko Holamta ato Holam tangasa i nika iraan no Dipong i, ira ho ko militafaday a demak. O kafana'an to pakayniay i kafafalic no mikowanay to Taywan ato demak nangra i Pangcah i, mahaenay. Saka cecay i, i 1590 a miheca a tayni i Taywan ko Poetakal a finacadan no Europe a maro', mipahaciway ko demak nangra a micomod itini. Itiya ho i, o kilakilang ho a ma'emin ko Taywan, caay ho ka pamatang ko Taywan itiya. Saka tosa i, o Holanto (Netherlan) ko tayniay itini i saka pito a folad no 1602 mihecaan, tona caay ka 'edeng ko sofitay nangra, saka ira to ko no Holam a sofitay a milaplap i cangraan. Mata'elif k tosa polo' miheca (1622) i, keriden ni Karl ko sofitay no Holanto a micomod i Pengfu, ta songila'en nangra ko pisitalaan. I 1624 mihecaan micomod cangra to Taywan a maro' i Taynan a mikowan to polong no Taywan. I 1630 mhecaan patireng cangra i An-ping to pisitalaan no sofiyay a loma', ta itiya i 1650 mihecaan a mapatireng nangra ko roma a pisatalaan to iraay ho a pikacawan. Mapasifana' no Holanto ko maro'ay itini i Taywan a masaPangcahay (Yincomin). O tata'angay a demak nangra i, toloay, sakacecay i, o papaising to 'alomanay, mipatenak cangra pakayniay i pitoor to Kawas no misaKristoay, o romasato, pasifana' cangra to tilid. Na mikowan ko Holanta i 1626 miheca i, tayni sato ko Sipaniya a maro' itini i ka'amisay a niyaro' no Taywan tangasa i 1642 miheca itini i Taywan. I 'ayaw no piliyas no Holanta to Taywan i, safaw 'enem a miheca ko pidipot no Sipaniya. Nikawrira, caay ka tangasa itini i tadaPangcah ko tayal nangra. Mapalowad to no Sipaniya ko sapicomod no itiniay i Taywan to pitooran nangra o Tingsokiw. I Tangafolan cangra a patenak, safaw falo miheca ko Sipaniya a maro' itini i ka'amisay a niyaro' itiya ho. O romasato, itiya iraay to ko Dipong ato Holo tamdaw (o aniniay a Payrang) itini a macacamocamol a maro'. O Holanta pasayra itiraay i Singko a niyaro' no Taynan a Tangafolan patenak to sowal no Kawas itiya, saka ira ko lima a polo' ko tamdaw a mapaino'ay itiya. Nikawrira, oya i laloma'ay no kiwkay a mitooray facalay ko tayal i pili'en no Dipong a tamdaw patayra i kitakit nangra i Dipong papinanam to no Dipong a pakayraan a kawas, saka, yo minokay ito cangra i, caay to piraod to kiwkaycangra. Yo pikowan ho ko Holanta itini i, madadoedoay to ko Holam (Payrang) micomod i Taywan. Itiya ci Cen cen-kong ko milaplapay to Holanta nai Taywan, nanoya, safeleng sato micomod a tayni ko Holam a tamdaw. O pikowan no Holanta itini i Taywan ira ko 39 ko mihecaan itiya. O saka tolo i, o pikowan no Dipong itini i Taywan, o picingcing no Dipong itiya, nai 1895 mihecaan (Cinkowangsi 21 miheca, Dipong Minci 28 miheca) masasitelak to (Makowan telek) pakelac ko Taywan to Dipong, tangasa i 1945 miheca (Cawhe 20 miheca, Minko 34 miheca) o Conghoaminko ko micadaay, ira ko 50 mihecaan ko picingcingan itiya. O saka sepat i, o Congko a tamdaw (aniniay a Payrang) to ko micingcingay to Taywan, tangasa anini. ==== Mitiliday to no 'Amis, ci Masao Nikar. ====

ma…ĺikakaaj nikawrira, masamaanaj itija ńßakija? ¶aaj ka fana ° kita, o~u kafana °an ita i, mańßa…ônaj. ma…ĺ…ô ¶a…¨~…ģ ko~u taja…ĺ, to~u~uko~u~u, pino~u~ujo~u~umajan, taŇčafo~u…ĺan, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un no~u pisa…ĺisin to~u kaka…ôn…ôn to~u mińß…ô ¶ańß…ô ¶aan a mi…ĺitafa…¨~…ģ, samatija ńßan naira o~u pi °a…¨~…ģo~up to~u °a °a…¨~…ģo~up…ôn ko~u pi…ĺitafa…¨~…ģ. o~u maŇčta °aj a tafa…¨~…ģ i, o~u ma ¶o~u…¨~…ģańßaj a fafańßijan ko~u mamito~uka…¨~…ģ to~u nia maŇčta °aj a tafa…¨~…ģ a mi…ĺifaŇč…ôs. ¶aaj pat…ô…¨~…ģo~u a mipat…ô…ĺi to~u nia tafa…¨~…ģ, mi °…ô…¨~…ģaw ńßo~u a mitiŇči…ĺ to~u no~u kawas a ¶a °o~uf to~u ma…ĺo~u pipat…ô…ĺian, ta itira a misaŇča ° to~u pat…ô…ĺian, ta itira a mapaso~u °o~upo~u a ma °…ômin ko~u tafa…¨~…ģ. saka, mata…ĺaw a ta…ĺaraaj a ¶io~umańß ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw to~u na ira ko~u mi…ĺitafa…¨~…ģaj, jo~u ira to~u ko~u ńßo~u…ĺamta ato~u ńßo~u…ĺam taŇčasa i nika iraan no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč i, ira ńßo~u ko~u mi…ĺitafa…¨~…ģaj a …¨~…ģ…ômak. o~u kafana °an to~u pakajniaj i kafafa…ĺi ¶ no~u miko~uwanaj to~u tajwan ato~u …¨~…ģ…ômak naŇčra i paŇč ¶ańß i, mańßa…ônaj. saka ¶…ô ¶aj i, i **** a mińß…ô ¶a a tajni i tajwan ko~u po~u…ôtaka…ĺ a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan no~u …ôo~u~uro~up…ô a maro~u °, mipańßa ¶iwaj ko~u …¨~…ģ…ômak naŇčra a mi ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģ itini. itija ńßo~u i, o~u ki…ĺaki…ĺaŇč ńßo~u a ma °…ômin ko~u tajwan, ¶aaj ńßo~u ka pamataŇč ko~u tajwan itija. saka to~usa i, o~u ńßo~u…ĺanto~u (n…ôtńß…ôr…ĺan) ko~u tajniaj itini i saka pito~u a fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ no~u **** mińß…ô ¶aan, to~una ¶aaj ka °…ô…¨~…ģ…ôŇč ko~u so~ufitaj naŇčra, saka ira to~u ko~u no~u ńßo~u…ĺam a so~ufitaj a mi…ĺap…ĺap i ¶aŇčraan. mata °…ô…ĺif k to~usa po~u…ĺo~u ° mińß…ô ¶a (****) i, k…ôri…¨~…ģ…ôn ni kar…ĺ ko~u so~ufitaj no~u ńßo~u…ĺanto~u a mi ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģ i p…ôŇčfo~u~u, ta so~uŇči…ĺa °…ôn naŇčra ko~u pisita…ĺaan. i **** mińß…ô ¶aan mi ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģ ¶aŇčra to~u tajwan a maro~u ° i tajnan a miko~uwan to~u po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u tajwan. i **** mńß…ô ¶aan patir…ôŇč ¶aŇčra i an-piŇč to~u pisita…ĺaan no~u so~ufijaj a …ĺo~uma °, ta itija i **** mińß…ô ¶aan a mapatir…ôŇč naŇčra ko~u ro~uma a pisata…ĺaan to~u iraaj ńßo~u a pika ¶awan. mapasifana ° no~u ńßo~u…ĺanto~u ko~u maro~u °aj itini i tajwan a masapaŇč ¶ańßaj (jin ¶o~umin). o~u tata °aŇčaj a …¨~…ģ…ômak naŇčra i, to~u…ĺo~uaj, saka ¶…ô ¶aj i, o~u papaisiŇč to~u °a…ĺo~umanaj, mipat…ônak ¶aŇčra pakajniaj i pito~uo~ur to~u kawas no~u misakristo~uaj, o~u ro~umasato~u, pasifana ° ¶aŇčra to~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ. na miko~uwan ko~u ńßo~u…ĺanta i **** mińß…ô ¶a i, tajni sato~u ko~u sipanija a maro~u ° itini i ka °amisaj a nijaro~u ° no~u tajwan taŇčasa i **** mińß…ô ¶a itini i tajwan. i °ajaw no~u pi…ĺijas no~u ńßo~u…ĺanta to~u tajwan i, safaw °…ôn…ôm a mińß…ô ¶a ko~u pi…¨~…ģipo~ut no~u sipanija. nikawrira, ¶aaj ka taŇčasa itini i ta…¨~…ģapaŇč ¶ańß ko~u taja…ĺ naŇčra. mapa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģ to~u no~u sipanija ko~u sapi ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģ no~u itiniaj i tajwan to~u pito~uo~uran naŇčra o~u tiŇčso~ukiw. i taŇčafo~u…ĺan ¶aŇčra a pat…ônak, safaw fa…ĺo~u mińß…ô ¶a ko~u sipanija a maro~u ° itini i ka °amisaj a nijaro~u ° itija ńßo~u. o~u ro~umasato~u, itija iraaj to~u ko~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč ato~u ńßo~u…ĺo~u tam…¨~…ģaw (o~u aniniaj a pajraŇč) itini a ma ¶a ¶amo~u ¶amo~u…ĺ a maro~u °. o~u ńßo~u…ĺanta pasajra itiraaj i siŇčko~u a nijaro~u ° no~u tajnan a taŇčafo~u…ĺan pat…ônak to~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u kawas itija, saka ira ko~u …ĺima a po~u…ĺo~u ° ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw a mapaino~u °aj itija. nikawrira, o~uja i …ĺa…ĺo~uma °aj no~u kiwkaj a mito~uo~uraj fa ¶a…ĺaj ko~u taja…ĺ i pi…ĺi °…ôn no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč a tam…¨~…ģaw patajra i kitakit naŇčra i …¨~…ģipo~uŇč papinanam to~u no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč a pakajraan a kawas, saka, jo~u mino~ukaj ito~u ¶aŇčra i, ¶aaj to~u pirao~u…¨~…ģ to~u kiwkaj ¶aŇčra. jo~u piko~uwan ńßo~u ko~u ńßo~u…ĺanta itini i, ma…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģo~u…ô…¨~…ģo~uaj to~u ko~u ńßo~u…ĺam (pajraŇč) mi ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģ i tajwan. itija ¶i ¶…ôn ¶…ôn-ko~uŇč ko~u mi…ĺap…ĺapaj to~u ńßo~u…ĺanta nai tajwan, nano~uja, saf…ô…ĺ…ôŇč sato~u mi ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģ a tajni ko~u ńßo~u…ĺam a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u piko~uwan no~u ńßo~u…ĺanta itini i tajwan ira ko~u ** ko~u mińß…ô ¶aan itija. o~u saka to~u…ĺo~u i, o~u piko~uwan no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč itini i tajwan, o~u pi ¶iŇč ¶iŇč no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč itija, nai **** mińß…ô ¶aan ( ¶inko~uwaŇčsi ** mińß…ô ¶a, …¨~…ģipo~uŇč min ¶i ** mińß…ô ¶a) masasit…ô…ĺak to~u (mako~uwan t…ô…ĺ…ôk) pak…ô…ĺa ¶ ko~u tajwan to~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč, taŇčasa i **** mińß…ô ¶a ( ¶awńß…ô ** mińß…ô ¶a, minko~u ** mińß…ô ¶a) o~u ¶o~uŇčńßo~uaminko~u ko~u mi ¶a…¨~…ģaaj, ira ko~u ** mińß…ô ¶aan ko~u pi ¶iŇč ¶iŇčan itija. o~u saka s…ôpat i, o~u ¶o~uŇčko~u a tam…¨~…ģaw (aniniaj a pajraŇč) to~u ko~u mi ¶iŇč ¶iŇčaj to~u tajwan, taŇčasa anini. ==== miti…ĺi…¨~…ģaj to~u no~u °amis, ¶i masao~u nikar. ====
